summary:
Let me use Python to make the precise fix needed:

<function=Write>
<parameter=content>
[['bool, str]:\n    "', 'Check if the session holder has admin access.\n\n    Returns (allowed, reason). The actual username (as stored in the\n    session) is compared against the ADMIN_USERS list. This prevents\n    privilege escalation via visual spoofing of Unicode BIDI chars.\n    "', '\n    session = get_session(token)\n    if not session:\n        return False, "invalid session"\n\n    username = session["username"], {}]
</parameter>

</parameter>
